items.title: Early versus conventional postoperative rehabilitation after reverse total shoulder arthroplasty: a systematic review of functional outcomes and complications.
items.summary: A systematic review found that early rehabilitation (motion within 14 days) after reverse total shoulder arthroplasty (rTSA) leads to better functional outcomes without increasing complications, compared to delayed programs (motion after 28 days).
items.curatedReason: 关于反式全肩关节置换术（rTSA）术后康复，这项系统综述发现，与延迟康复相比，早期康复（14天内开始活动）能带来更好的功能结局，且并发症发生率无显著差异。这支持早期活动作为 rTSA 术后康复的优选方案。
items.titleZh: 反式全肩关节置换术后早期与传统康复的功能结局及并发症系统综述
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述发现，与延迟康复（28天后活动）相比，反式全肩关节置换术（rTSA）术后早期康复（14天内活动）可带来更好的功能结局，且并发症无显著增加。
items.curatedReasonEn: For reverse total shoulder arthroplasty (rTSA) postoperative rehabilitation, this systematic review found that early rehabilitation (motion within 14 days) leads to better functional outcomes with no significant difference in complication rates compared to delayed programs. This supports early motion as the preferred approach for rTSA.

items.title: Many Paths to Recovery: The Case for Treatment Pluralism.
items.summary: An editorial argues that decades of research have not identified a consistently superior treatment for musculoskeletal pain, with interventions like exercise therapy and manual techniques demonstrating modest, broadly equivalent effects, advocating for treatment pluralism.
items.curatedReason: JOSPT 这篇社论指出，几十年研究未能找到一种对肌肉骨骼疼痛持续优越的单一治疗方法，各种干预措施（如运动疗法和手法技术）效果相当。这强调了治疗多元化，你应避免过度执着于某种特定技术，而是根据个体患者需求进行综合评估和治疗。
items.titleZh: 恢复之路多径并存：治疗多元化的论证
items.summaryZh: 一篇社论指出，几十年的研究未能找到一种持续优越的肌肉骨骼疼痛治疗方法，运动疗法和手法技术等干预措施效果相当，这支持治疗多元化。
items.curatedReasonEn: This JOSPT editorial argues that decades of research haven't found a consistently superior single treatment for musculoskeletal (MSK) pain, with various interventions like exercise therapy and manual techniques showing broadly equivalent effects. This emphasizes treatment pluralism; you should avoid over-reliance on any single technique and instead focus on comprehensive assessment and individualized treatment.
items.journal: The Journal of orthopaedic and sports physical therapy

items.title: Wearable Myoelectric Interface for Neurorehabilitation (MINT) to Recover Arm Activity After Stroke: A Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A randomized, sham-controlled trial (N=76) found that home-based Wearable Myoelectric Interface for Neurorehabilitation (MINT) significantly improved arm activity and reduced abnormal co-activation in chronic stroke survivors.
items.curatedReason: 这项随机对照试验表明，可穿戴肌电界面神经康复（MINT）系统可有效减少卒中后手臂异常共激活并改善手臂活动。这是卒中康复技术的一项重要进展，你应关注这类家庭可用的技术在促进功能恢复上的潜力。
items.titleZh: 可穿戴肌电神经康复界面（MINT）用于卒中后手臂活动恢复：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机、假对照试验（N=76）发现，居家使用的可穿戴肌电神经康复界面（MINT）能显著改善慢性卒中幸存者的手臂活动，并减少异常协同激活。
items.curatedReasonEn: This randomized controlled trial demonstrates that the Wearable Myoelectric Interface for Neurorehabilitation (MINT) system effectively reduces abnormal co-activation and improves arm activity after stroke. This is a significant advancement in stroke rehabilitation technology, and you should pay attention to the potential of such home-based technologies in promoting functional recovery.

items.title: Sit-to-stand test emerges as a powerful prognostic factor of future health outcomes: different versions, measurement properties and future perspectives
items.summary: A recent meta-analysis highlighted the sit-to-stand test as a powerful prognostic factor for multiple long-term health conditions in adults and older adults, suggesting its strong value among simple muscular strength tests.
items.curatedReason: 这篇 BJSM 的文章强调了“坐立测试”在预测长期健康状况方面的强大预后价值。你应将其作为一种简单有效的现场测试，常规纳入你的患者评估流程中。
items.titleZh: 坐立测试成为未来健康结果的强大预后因素：不同版本、测量特性及未来展望
items.summaryZh: 一项最新荟萃分析指出，坐立测试在预测成人和老年人多种长期健康状况方面具有强大的预后价值，表明其在简单肌肉力量测试中具有重要意义。
items.curatedReasonEn: This BJSM article highlights the strong prognostic value of the sit-to-stand test for predicting long-term health outcomes. You should regularly incorporate it into your patient assessment process as a simple and effective field-based test.

items.title: Multimodal symptom-targeted treatment for young people with persisting post-concussion symptoms: a randomised clinical trial
items.summary: A single-site, open-label, assessor-blinded, parallel-group randomized clinical trial is evaluating the effectiveness of Concussion Essentials (CE), a symptom-targeted, multidisciplinary treatment for persisting post-concussion symptoms (PPCS) in 8–18-year-olds.
items.curatedReason: 这项随机临床试验评估了“脑震荡要点”（Concussion Essentials, CE）多学科治疗方案对持续性脑震荡后症状 (PPCS) 的有效性。如果试验结果积极，这将为你提供一个针对青少年 PPCS 的循证、结构化干预方案，改变你对这类复杂病例的管理方式。
items.titleZh: 针对持续性脑震荡后症状年轻患者的多模式症状靶向治疗：一项随机临床试验
items.summaryZh: 一项单中心、开放标签、评估者盲法、平行组随机临床试验正在评估“脑震荡要点”（CE），一种针对8-18岁儿童持续性脑震荡后症状（PPCS）的多学科症状靶向治疗的有效性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This randomized clinical trial evaluates the effectiveness of the "Concussion Essentials" (CE) multidisciplinary treatment for persisting post-concussion symptoms (PPCS). If the trial results are positive, this will provide you with an evidence-based, structured intervention program for adolescent PPCS, changing how you manage these complex cases.

items.title: Long-term resistance training with all-cause and cause-specific mortality: assessing dose-response and joint associations with aerobic physical activity
items.summary: A study across three large prospective cohorts (N>100,000) investigated the association between long-term resistance training and lower all-cause and cause-specific mortality, assessing dose-response and joint effects with aerobic activity.
items.curatedReason: 这项针对三个大型前瞻性队列的研究，评估了长期阻力训练与全因和特定原因死亡率的关系，并探讨了剂量反应和与有氧活动的联合效应。这将为你提供强有力的证据，支持将阻力训练纳入患者的长期健康管理方案中，并指导剂量安排。
items.titleZh: 长期阻力训练与全因和特定原因死亡率：评估剂量反应和与有氧活动的联合关联
items.summaryZh: 一项针对三个大型前瞻性队列（N>100,000）的研究，调查了长期阻力训练与较低的全因和特定原因死亡率之间的关联，并评估了剂量反应以及与有氧活动的联合效应。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study across three large prospective cohorts evaluated the relationship between long-term resistance training and all-cause and cause-specific mortality, exploring dose-response and joint effects with aerobic activity. This will provide you with strong evidence to support integrating resistance training into patients' long-term health management plans and guide dosing.

items.title: Exercise interventions for rotator cuff-related shoulder pain in middle-aged and older adults: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis found that exercise-based interventions effectively reduce pain and improve function in middle-aged and older adults with rotator cuff-related shoulder pain.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和荟萃分析再次确认，运动干预对中老年肩袖相关肩痛患者的疼痛和功能均有效。你应继续将运动疗法作为这类患者的一线干预措施。
items.titleZh: 中老年人肩袖相关肩痛的运动干预：系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和荟萃分析发现，基于运动的干预措施能有效减轻中老年肩袖相关肩痛患者的疼痛并改善其功能。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis reconfirms that exercise interventions are effective for both pain and function in middle-aged and older adults with rotator cuff-related shoulder pain. You should continue to prioritize exercise therapy as a first-line intervention for these patients.

items.title: Diagnostic and prognostic accuracy of Berg Balance Scale and Mini-Balance Evaluation Systems Test in individuals with stroke: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis investigated the diagnostic and prognostic accuracy of Berg Balance Scale (BBS) and Mini-Balance Evaluation Systems Test (Mini-BESTest) cutoff values in individuals with stroke for various reference standards.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和荟萃分析评估了 Berg 平衡量表（BBS）和 Mini-Balance Evaluation Systems Test（Mini-BESTest）在卒中患者中的诊断和预后准确性。你应根据其推荐的参考标准，审慎选择并在临床上应用这些量表进行平衡评估。
items.titleZh: 卒中患者 Berg 平衡量表和 Mini-Balance Evaluation Systems Test 的诊断和预后准确性：系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和荟萃分析研究了 Berg 平衡量表（BBS）和 Mini-Balance Evaluation Systems Test（Mini-BESTest）在卒中患者中不同参考标准的诊断和预后准确性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis evaluates the diagnostic and prognostic accuracy of the Berg Balance Scale (BBS) and Mini-Balance Evaluation Systems Test (Mini-BESTest) in stroke individuals. You should carefully select and apply these scales for balance assessment in clinical practice, guided by their recommended reference standards.

items.title: Randomised three-armed trial investigation of the Copenhagen Achilles tendon Rupture Treatment Algorithm (CARTA) for individualised treatment of acute Achilles tendon rupture
items.summary: A multicenter, three-arm randomized controlled trial is investigating whether individualized treatment using the Copenhagen Achilles Tendon Rupture Treatment Algorithm (CARTA) is superior to default operative or non-operative strategies for acute Achilles tendon rupture.
items.curatedReason: 这项三臂随机对照试验评估了哥本哈根跟腱断裂治疗算法（CARTA）的个体化治疗方案。如果研究结果能证明个体化治疗的优越性，你应考虑将其作为跟腱断裂患者管理的新决策工具。
items.titleZh: 哥本哈根跟腱断裂治疗算法（CARTA）个体化治疗急性跟腱断裂的随机三臂试验研究
items.summaryZh: 一项多中心、三臂随机对照试验正在研究使用哥本哈根跟腱断裂治疗算法（CARTA）进行个体化治疗是否优于急性跟腱断裂的常规手术或非手术策略。
items.curatedReasonEn: This three-arm randomized controlled trial evaluates the individualized treatment approach of the Copenhagen Achilles Tendon Rupture Treatment Algorithm (CARTA). If the results demonstrate the superiority of individualized treatment, you should consider it a new decision-making tool for managing Achilles tendon rupture patients.

items.title: Effectiveness of maintenance interventions promoting physical activity following exercise therapy for chronic conditions: an umbrella review
items.summary: An umbrella review is investigating the effectiveness of maintenance interventions post-exercise therapy on physical activity, physical function, fitness, health-related quality of life, adverse events, hospitalization, and return to work in people with chronic conditions.
items.curatedReason: 这项伞形综述旨在调查慢性病患者在运动治疗后促进身体活动维持干预措施的有效性。其结果将直接影响你如何设计和实施维持计划，以确保患者长期依从性并保持治疗效果。
items.titleZh: 慢性病运动治疗后促进身体活动维持干预措施的有效性：一项伞形综述
items.summaryZh: 一项伞形综述正在调查慢性病患者在运动治疗后，促进身体活动维持干预措施对身体活动、身体功能、体能、健康相关生活质量、不良事件、住院和重返工作的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This umbrella review aims to investigate the effectiveness of maintenance interventions promoting physical activity following exercise therapy for chronic conditions. Its results will directly impact how you design and implement maintenance plans to ensure long-term patient adherence and sustain treatment effects.

items.title: Comparative effectiveness of supervised individual, group-based, and mixed physiotherapy approaches on pain and function in patients with chronic pain in primary care: a retrospective observational study.
items.summary: A retrospective observational study found that supervised individual, group-based, and mixed physiotherapy approaches showed comparable effectiveness on pain and function in primary care patients with chronic pain.
items.curatedReason: 这项观察性研究表明，对于原发性慢性疼痛患者，个体化、团体或混合物理治疗方案在疼痛和功能改善上效果相当。当你需要在多种交付模式之间选择时，这支持根据患者偏好和资源情况灵活安排。
items.titleZh: 门诊慢性疼痛患者个体、团体及混合物理治疗方案对疼痛和功能影响的比较：回顾性观察研究
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性观察研究显示，对于门诊慢性疼痛患者，个体化、团体式以及混合式监督物理治疗方法在改善疼痛和功能方面的效果相当。
items.curatedReasonEn: This observational study suggests that for primary care patients with chronic pain, individual, group-based, or mixed physiotherapy approaches yield comparable outcomes in pain and function. This supports flexibility in delivery models based on patient preference and resource availability when choosing between options.

items.title: Is Knee Osteoarthritis an Inevitable Consequence for Athletes after Anterior Cruciate Ligament Injury?
items.summary: This perspective piece suggests that anterior cruciate ligament (ACL) injury should be viewed as the start of a long-term knee health condition potentially leading to post-traumatic osteoarthritis, despite advances in surgical reconstruction.
items.curatedReason: 这篇文章强调了 ACL 损伤不仅是短期运动损伤，更是长期膝关节健康的风险因素，可能导致创伤后骨关节炎。跟患者谈复健时，你应管理他们对长期膝关节健康的预期。
items.titleZh: 前交叉韧带损伤后，膝骨关节炎是运动员不可避免的后果吗？
items.summaryZh: 这篇述评提出，前交叉韧带（ACL）损伤应被视为长期膝关节健康问题的开端，可能导致创伤后膝骨关节炎，而非仅仅是短期运动损伤。
items.curatedReasonEn: This article highlights that ACL injury is not just a short-term sports injury but a long-term risk factor for knee joint health, potentially leading to post-traumatic osteoarthritis. When discussing rehabilitation with patients, you should manage their expectations regarding long-term knee health.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Effect of home-based rehabilitation in frail older adults after cardiac surgery: a prospective feasibility study.
items.summary: A prospective feasibility study evaluated the Vivifrail multicomponent exercise program for home-based rehabilitation in frail older adults after cardiac surgery, suggesting its feasibility in the postoperative period.
items.curatedReason: 这项前瞻性可行性研究显示，在心脏手术后针对虚弱老年人进行居家康复（Vivifrail 多组分运动项目）是可行的。这为你提供了一个在特定人群中实施居家心脏康复的潜在路径。
items.titleZh: 心脏手术后虚弱老年人居家康复的效果：一项前瞻性可行性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性可行性研究评估了Vivifrail多组分运动项目在心脏手术后虚弱老年人居家康复中的可行性，表明其在术后阶段是可行的。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective feasibility study demonstrates that home-based rehabilitation (Vivifrail multicomponent exercise program) is feasible for frail older adults after cardiac surgery. This offers a potential pathway for you to implement home-based cardiac rehabilitation in this specific population.

items.title: Effect of a multimodal exercise training program on sleep in older adults: a randomized controlled trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial (N=68) found that a 16-week multimodal exercise training program significantly improved sleep quality in older adults, with an effect size of d=0.86.
items.curatedReason: 这项随机对照试验表明，多模式运动训练计划能有效改善老年人的睡眠质量，效应量为 d=0.86。这是一个具有临床意义的发现，提示你可以在老年康复中将多模式运动作为改善睡眠的有效策略。
items.titleZh: 多模式运动训练计划对老年人睡眠的影响：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验（N=68）发现，为期16周的多模式运动训练计划显著改善了老年人的睡眠质量，效应量为 d=0.86。
items.curatedReasonEn: This randomized controlled trial showed that a multimodal exercise training program significantly improved sleep quality in older adults, with an effect size of d=0.86. This is a clinically meaningful finding, suggesting you can use multimodal exercise as an effective strategy to improve sleep in geriatric rehabilitation.

items.title: Long-term risk of knee replacement after ACL reconstruction using the contralateral knee as an internal control: a National Hospital Episode Statistics database study of 135 881 patients
items.summary: A National Hospital Episode Statistics database study of 135,881 patients estimated the population-specific relative risk of knee arthroplasty following anterior cruciate ligament (ACL) reconstruction, using the contralateral knee as an internal control.
items.curatedReason: 这项大规模国家数据库研究通过以对侧膝关节为内对照，评估了 ACL 重建术后膝关节置换的长期风险。你应将此信息纳入患者咨询，帮助他们理解 ACLr 后的潜在长期并发症，并强调持续康复和预防的重要性。
items.titleZh: 以对侧膝关节为内对照，评估 ACL 重建术后膝关节置换的长期风险：一项涵盖 135,881 名患者的国家医院病案统计数据库研究
items.summaryZh: 一项基于国家医院病案统计数据库，涵盖 135,881 名患者的研究，以对侧膝关节为内对照，评估了前交叉韧带（ACL）重建术后膝关节置换的群体特异性相对风险。
items.curatedReasonEn: This large national database study evaluated the long-term risk of knee replacement after ACL reconstruction, using the contralateral knee as an internal control. You should incorporate this information into patient counseling to help them understand potential long-term complications post-ACLr and emphasize the importance of ongoing rehabilitation and prevention.

items.title: Developing consensus on competency-based educational standards in orthopaedic manual physical therapy fellowship training: part 2: knowledge for specialty practice and professionalism.
items.summary: This study, part 2 of a series, focuses on developing consensus on competency-based educational standards for Orthopaedic Manual Physical Therapy (OMPT) fellowship training, specifically addressing knowledge required for specialty practice and professionalism.
items.curatedReason: 这份共识文件第二部分旨在建立骨科手法物理治疗 (OMPT) 专科进修培训的能力标准，特别关注专业实践和职业素养所需的知识。对于从事 OMPT 教学或寻求高级培训的你，这有助于标准化和提升教育质量。
items.titleZh: 骨科手法物理治疗专科进修培训能力本位教育标准共识的制定：第二部分：专业实践和职业素养知识
items.summaryZh: 本研究作为系列文章的第二部分，旨在为骨科手法物理治疗（OMPT）专科进修培训制定能力本位教育标准共识，重点关注专业实践和职业素养所需的知识。
items.curatedReasonEn: This consensus document, Part 2, aims to establish competency standards for Orthopaedic Manual Physical Therapy (OMPT) fellowship training, focusing on knowledge required for specialty practice and professionalism. For those involved in OMPT education or seeking advanced training, this contributes to standardizing and enhancing educational quality.
items.journal: The Journal of manual & manipulative therapy

items.title: Effect of Femoral Nerve Neurodynamic Techniques on Pain in Patellofemoral Pain Syndrome: A Randomised Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial (N=71) found that adding femoral nerve neurodynamic techniques to routine physiotherapy did not provide additional value for pain and function in patients with patellofemoral pain syndrome.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 发现，股神经神经动力学技术对髌股疼痛综合征患者的疼痛和功能没有额外价值。继续使用常规治疗方案，对于髌股疼痛综合征，不要指望仅靠股神经松动来获得显著改善。
items.titleZh: 股神经神经动力学技术对髌股疼痛综合征患者疼痛的影响：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验（N=71）发现，在常规物理治疗中增加股神经神经动力学技术，对髌股疼痛综合征患者的疼痛和功能没有额外价值。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT found no additional benefit of femoral nerve neurodynamic techniques for pain and function in patients with patellofemoral pain syndrome. Continue with conventional treatment protocols, and do not expect significant improvements from femoral nerve mobilization alone for patellofemoral pain syndrome.

items.title: How do people with multiple sclerosis who have walking difficulties perceive participation? A qualitative analysis.
items.summary: A qualitative study explored how people with multiple sclerosis and walking difficulties perceive participation, highlighting the need to incorporate subjective perceptions beyond the ICF framework in rehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: 这项定性研究探讨了多发性硬化症（MS）伴行走困难患者对参与的感知。它强调了国际功能、残疾和健康分类（ICF）框架可能未能完全捕捉患者主观体验，这提示你在评估 MS 患者参与度时，应更深入地理解他们的个人视角。
items.titleZh: 多发性硬化症伴行走困难患者对参与的感知：一项定性分析
items.summaryZh: 一项定性研究探讨了多发性硬化症伴行走困难患者对“参与”的感知，强调了在康复中除了ICF框架外，还需纳入主观感知。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study explores the perceptions of participation among people with multiple sclerosis (MS) who have walking difficulties. It highlights that the International Classification of Functioning, Disability and Health (ICF) framework may not fully capture subjective patient experiences, suggesting you should delve deeper into individual perspectives when assessing participation in MS patients.

items.title: THE COMPARATIVE EFFECTIVENESS OF INPATIENT VERSUS SKILLED NURSING FACILITY REHABILITATION USING LINKED ACUTE STROKE REGISTRY DATA.
items.summary: A retrospective observational study examined the comparative effectiveness of inpatient rehabilitation facilities (IRFs) versus skilled nursing facilities (SNFs) on “home time” as a proxy for functional recovery in acute stroke patients.
items.curatedReason: 这项回顾性观察研究比较了住院康复机构 (IRF) 与专业护理机构 (SNF) 卒中康复的有效性，以“居家时间”作为功能恢复的代理指标。你应将这些数据纳入考虑，以指导患者转诊和康复路径选择。
items.titleZh: 利用急性卒中登记数据比较住院康复与专业护理机构康复的有效性
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性观察研究，利用急性卒中登记数据，比较了住院康复机构（IRFs）与专业护理机构（SNFs）康复对急性卒中患者“居家时间”（功能恢复的替代指标）的比较有效性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This retrospective observational study compares the effectiveness of stroke rehabilitation at inpatient rehabilitation facilities (IRFs) versus skilled nursing facilities (SNFs), using “time at home” as a proxy for functional recovery. You should consider this data to guide patient referrals and rehabilitation pathway choices.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

items.title: Core Stability Training for Post-Stroke Recovery: A Multifaceted Approach to Enhance Postural Control and Motor Function.
items.summary: This review explores the multifaceted mechanisms and potential benefits of Core Stability Training (CST) as an intervention to enhance postural control and motor function in stroke survivors.
items.curatedReason: 这篇综述探讨了核心稳定性训练在卒中后恢复中的多方面作用，特别是在增强姿势控制和运动功能方面。将其作为卒中患者康复计划的潜在补充策略。
items.titleZh: 卒中后恢复的核心稳定性训练：增强姿势控制和运动功能的多方面方法
items.summaryZh: 本综述探讨了核心稳定性训练（CST）作为一种干预措施，在增强卒中幸存者姿势控制和运动功能方面的多方面机制和潜在益处。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review explores the multifaceted role of Core Stability Training (CST) in post-stroke recovery, particularly in enhancing postural control and motor function. Consider it a potential supplementary strategy in your stroke rehabilitation plans.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Association between Patellofemoral Conditions and the Incidence of ACL Injury: Could Patellofemoral Conditions be a Risk Factor for ACL Injury? A 10-year Population-Based Study.
items.summary: A 10-year population-based study investigated whether prior patellofemoral conditions are associated with an increased incidence of anterior cruciate ligament (ACL) injury, a link previously suggested by neuromuscular and movement deficits.
items.curatedReason: 这项基于人群的研究探讨了髌股关节病与 ACL 损伤风险的关联。尽管之前研究有所提示，但大规模证据仍需更多累积。你应在评估 ACL 损伤风险时，继续关注神经肌肉和运动缺陷，但对于髌股关节病作为独立高风险因素的判断需谨慎。
items.titleZh: 髌股关节病与 ACL 损伤发生率的关联：髌股关节病是否是 ACL 损伤的风险因素？一项为期10年的人群研究
items.summaryZh: 一项为期10年的人群研究探讨了髌股关节病史是否与前交叉韧带（ACL）损伤发生率增加相关，此前研究曾通过神经肌肉和运动缺陷提示两者可能存在关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: This population-based study investigates the association between patellofemoral conditions and ACL injury risk. Although previous studies have suggested a link, large-scale evidence still requires further accumulation. You should continue to focus on neuromuscular and movement deficits when assessing ACL injury risk, but be cautious in judging patellofemoral conditions as an independent high-risk factor.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Influence of environmental barriers and facilitators on functioning: Analytical observational study in community-dwelling older adults.
items.summary: An analytical observational study investigated the influence of environmental barriers and facilitators on the functioning of community-dwelling older adults using standardized quantitative instruments.
items.curatedReason: 这项分析性观察研究强调了环境障碍和促进因素对社区老年人功能的重要性。你在评估老年患者时，应更全面地考虑他们所处的生活环境，并将其纳入干预计划。
items.titleZh: 环境障碍和促进因素对功能的影响：社区老年人的分析性观察研究
items.summaryZh: 一项分析性观察研究，利用标准化的量化工具，调查了环境障碍和促进因素对社区老年人功能的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This analytical observational study highlights the importance of environmental barriers and facilitators on the functioning of community-dwelling older adults. When assessing older patients, you should more comprehensively consider their living environment and integrate it into intervention plans.

items.title: From robustness to frailty: how post-COVID-19 frailty shapes dyspnea, fatigue, and physical and functional status in post-COVID-19 syndrome.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study (N=45) found that post-COVID-19 frailty significantly shapes dyspnea, fatigue, and physical and functional status in subjects with post-COVID-19 syndrome, with worse outcomes correlating with higher frailty levels.
items.curatedReason: 这项横断面研究显示，COVID-19 后遗症患者的虚弱程度与呼吸困难、疲劳以及身体和功能状态显著相关。你应在评估和管理 COVID-19 后遗症患者时，将虚弱程度作为关键考量因素。
items.titleZh: 从强健到虚弱：COVID-19后虚弱如何影响COVID-19后综合征患者的呼吸困难、疲劳及身心功能状态
items.summaryZh: 一项横断面研究（N=45）发现，COVID-19 后虚弱显著影响COVID-19 后综合征患者的呼吸困难、疲劳以及身体和功能状态，且虚弱程度越高，结局越差。
items.curatedReasonEn: This cross-sectional study shows a significant relationship between post-COVID-19 frailty and dyspnea, fatigue, and physical and functional status in patients with post-COVID-19 syndrome. You should consider frailty as a key factor when assessing and managing patients with post-COVID-19 syndrome.

items.title: Retraction Note: The effectiveness of routine physiotherapy with and without neuromobilization on pain and functional disability in patients with shoulder impingement syndrome; a randomized control clinical trial.
items.summary: This is a retraction notice for a randomized controlled clinical trial that had previously reported on the effectiveness of routine physiotherapy with and without neuromobilization for shoulder impingement syndrome.
items.curatedReason: 此为一篇撤稿声明。原研究声称神经松动术对肩峰撞击综合征有效，但现已撤回，表示此研究结论不再可信。你应将此撤稿信息纳入你的循证实践考量。
items.titleZh: 撤稿声明：常规物理治疗结合或不结合神经松动术治疗肩峰撞击综合征对疼痛和功能障碍的有效性；一项随机对照临床试验
items.summaryZh: 这是一篇撤稿声明，涉及一项此前报告了常规物理治疗结合或不结合神经松动术对肩峰撞击综合征有效性的随机对照临床试验。

items.title: Smartphone-Based Semi-Immersive Virtual Reality Enhances Upper Extremity Function in Subacute Stroke: A Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial (n=60) found that smartphone-based semi-immersive virtual reality, when augmented with conventional physical therapy, significantly enhanced upper extremity function in individuals with subacute stroke compared to conventional therapy alone.
items.curatedReason: 这项RCT证明了智能手机虚拟现实辅助康复对亚急性期卒中上肢功能恢复的有效性。在传统物理治疗基础上引入低成本、半沉浸式VR，能显著增强患者康复效果，这是值得你考虑的低成本技术补充方案。
items.titleZh: 智能手机半沉浸式虚拟现实改善亚急性期卒中上肢功能：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验（n=60）发现，与单独的传统物理治疗相比，智能手机半沉浸式虚拟现实结合传统物理治疗显著改善了亚急性期卒中患者的上肢功能。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT demonstrated the effectiveness of smartphone-based virtual reality-assisted rehabilitation for upper extremity function recovery in subacute stroke. Introducing low-cost, semi-immersive VR to traditional physical therapy can significantly enhance patient rehabilitation outcomes, making it a viable low-cost technological supplement for your consideration.

items.title: Effectiveness of passive vs. assistive robotic gait training on functional recovery and neuroplasticity post-stroke: A randomized controlled trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial (n=48) found that assistive robotic gait training was more effective than passive robotic gait training in improving lower limb motor function recovery and neuroplasticity in subacute stroke patients.
items.curatedReason: 这项RCT对比了被动与辅助机器人步态训练对亚急性卒中患者功能恢复和神经可塑性的影响。结果显示，辅助模式在改善下肢运动功能和促进神经重塑方面优于被动模式，为你选择机器人辅助康复方案提供了明确依据。
items.titleZh: 被动与辅助机器人步态训练对卒中后功能恢复和神经可塑性的疗效：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验（n=48）发现，辅助机器人步态训练在改善亚急性卒中患者下肢运动功能恢复和神经可塑性方面，优于被动机器人步态训练。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT compared the effects of passive versus assistive robotic gait training on functional recovery and neuroplasticity in subacute stroke patients. Results showed that the assistive mode was superior to the passive mode in improving lower limb motor function and promoting neural remodeling, providing clear evidence for your choice of robot-assisted rehabilitation programs.

items.title: The impact of a brief online education intervention on the knowledge, attitudes and beliefs of qualified physiotherapists about chronic low back pain: Pre- and post-intervention survey.
items.summary: A brief online education intervention significantly improved qualified physiotherapists' knowledge, attitudes, and beliefs about chronic low back pain in a pre- and post-intervention survey.
items.curatedReason: 在线教育干预对物理治疗师慢性腰痛知识、态度和信念有显著短期改善。但研究只关注认知层面，缺乏对实际临床行为改变或患者结局的衡量，提示其在实践中的长期有效性仍需更多证据。
items.titleZh: 在线教育干预对物理治疗师慢性腰痛知识、态度和信念影响：干预前后调查
items.summaryZh: 一项对合格物理治疗师进行的调查显示，简短的在线教育干预显著改善了他们对慢性腰痛的知识、态度和信念。
items.curatedReasonEn: Online education significantly improved physiotherapists' knowledge, attitudes, and beliefs regarding chronic low back pain in the short term. However, the study focused solely on cognitive changes, lacking measures of actual clinical behavior change or patient outcomes, indicating that long-term effectiveness in practice still requires further evidence.
items.journal: The South African journal of physiotherapy

items.title: Are There Sex Disparities in Return to Sport After Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction? A Systematic Review and Exploratory Meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and exploratory meta-analysis investigated sex disparities in return-to-sport (RTS) outcomes after anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction (ACLR), noting potentially lower RTS rates in female athletes.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和Meta分析探讨了ACL重建术后重返运动的性别差异。数据显示女性再损伤率和重返运动率可能与男性不同，你需要在康复计划中考虑这些性别特异性因素，并为女性运动员提供更精细的风险管理。
items.titleZh: 前交叉韧带重建术后重返运动是否存在性别差异？一项系统综述和探索性Meta分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和探索性Meta分析调查了前交叉韧带重建（ACLR）术后重返运动（RTS）结局的性别差异，指出女性运动员的RTS率可能较低。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis explores sex disparities in return to sport after ACL reconstruction. Data suggest that re-injury rates and return-to-sport rates may differ between females and males. You need to consider these sex-specific factors in rehabilitation plans and provide more detailed risk management for female athletes.
items.journal: The American journal of sports medicine

items.title: Functional stratification reveals speed-independent gait impairments beyond chronological age.
items.summary: Stratifying older adults by functional status using the Short Physical Performance Battery revealed speed-independent gait impairments, suggesting functional age is a better indicator than chronological age for detecting early impairments.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究表明，通过功能状态而非年龄对老年人进行分层，能揭示独立于步速的步态障碍。这意味着在评估老年患者时，你应更侧重其功能表现，而非简单以年龄划分，以早期发现并干预步态问题。
items.titleZh: 功能分层揭示独立于步速的步态障碍，超越生理年龄限制
items.summaryZh: 通过使用简易体能表现量表（SPPB）按功能状态对老年人进行分层，揭示了独立于步速的步态障碍，表明功能年龄是检测早期损伤的更好指标，而非实际年龄。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study indicates that stratifying older adults by functional status rather than chronological age reveals gait impairments independent of speed. This means that when assessing older patients, you should focus more on their functional performance than simply categorizing by age, to detect and intervene on gait issues early.

items.title: Mandatory genetic testing in sport: World Athletics and World Boxing repeat the discredited mistakes of the past
items.summary: World Athletics and World Boxing implemented mandatory SRY gene testing for female category participation, sparking controversy and raising ethical concerns.
items.curatedReason: 世界田径和世界拳击强制性SRY基因检测引发争议。这一政策可能对运动员的心理和社会福祉产生重大影响，你需要关注这类政策的伦理考量及其对运动员整体健康的影响，而非仅仅关注生理表现。
items.titleZh: 强制性基因检测在体育领域：世界田径和世界拳击重蹈过去 discredited 的覆辙
items.summaryZh: 世界田径和世界拳击对女性参赛者实施强制性SRY基因检测，引发争议并提出伦理担忧。
items.curatedReasonEn: Mandatory SRY gene testing by World Athletics and World Boxing has sparked controversy. This policy could significantly impact athletes' psychological and social well-being, and you need to consider the ethical implications of such policies and their effects on athletes' overall health, rather than just physiological performance.
